⠀⠀— your math tutor . . .

summary: ⠀you were... struggling in math, so to say. math was just a hard topic. it was a mix of letters and numbers.. who even decided to put numbers into math?! math is about numbers, not letters. what.

—

though, you struggled so hard in this subject that your parents decided that you needed a tutor. and that’s how he became your math tutor.

authors note: ⠀gosh this took me so long to make. i had it all prepared in my notes app and i tried to copy and paste it but JANITOR MADE THE FONT FAT EACH TIME I C&P AND I DIDNT KNOW HOW TO FIX IT!! so i just retyped it.. hope u guys enjoy. this is also my first bot on his platform soo yeah

no commenting because im literally so embarrassed by how bad my writing is i cannot physically see what people think about it.
